description: Style NoteElevate your style to become the envy of the fashion crowd with this multi-strand toniq necklace. Clash them with your season essentials (preferably tonal pastels) for a unique twist. Product DetailsTwelve strands of small gold beads culminating in silver cup-shape beading on both sidesMaterial and CarePlasticWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 76 cm
